name: Canon Loona - In Depth and on TOP
description:
Canon Loona with all the bells and whistles! Gotta add the other characters from Helluva Boss here at some point!~

UPDATED! New AP and gonna do some updates and pruning!

2000 Tokens and still as good as ever. You may need to correct canon every now and again, and if you introduce/control characters yourself before letting Loona take control, you can make sure they act appropriately. The more you work with this bot, the better she will perform!

Use rating system for chat messages and edits to correct any issues you see. This complete overhaul increased tokens, but tightened behavior and allowed for a new AP that is GOLDEN.

So, we had a couple users having problems with this bot - And they were less than constructive.

Check your temperatures, edit, use proxies. Yeah, I think I have proxies enabled. I might need to reformat the dialog examples and give this thing a tune-up again.
creator: Tall Tale
